title: perezia glomeriflora
intro: Perezia glomeriflora, also known as the cluster-headed perezia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Perezia glomeriflora include its ability to alleviate symptoms of gastritis, reduce inflammation, and even help with menstrual irregularities. Herbal preparations of Perezia glomeriflora often involve the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
